scope: Visual-presentation-only polish of the demo Runtime: camera calibration, board framing/palette, environment cohesion, lighting/grounding, and UI tone. No gameplay, Combat ordering, balance, board topology, motion timing, motion binary, Skill/Cast, projectile, or VFX change.

userVisualDirection.referenceUsage: Mood/color/camera-feel/framing/composition-density/UI-tone reference only -- an original Auto-Battler interpretation; no external UI frames, icons, card designs, artwork, logos, motifs, branded assets, or exact layout measurements were copied. No external asset of any kind was imported; every visual change is a parameter/palette/procedural-canvas change to content already in this repository.

preImplementationAudit.boardMesh: 8x7 tile grid (GRID_COLS=8, GRID_ROWS=7, TILE=1, row 6 = merged bench row, MAX_BENCH=5) of per-tile PlaneGeometry(0.98) + procedural 32x32 canvas stone textures, checker A/B, MeshStandardMaterial with per-zone baseTint.
preImplementationAudit.boardWorldScale: half-extent ~4.25 x 3.75 world units incl. 0.25 margin.
preImplementationAudit.cameraType: THREE.OrthographicCamera with contain-fit frustum recomputed by layoutBoard() on every resize (board corners projected via camera.worldToLocal).
preImplementationAudit.responsiveBehavior: layoutBoard() on window resize; narrow-viewport width-fit fallback; topbar-overlap deficit correction from live DOM measurement.
preImplementationAudit.environment: 60x60 procedural mosaic ground (navy-charcoal #23283a tinted 0x9aa0b8), navy stage rim 0x2c3448 + gold trim, 4 corner posts with navy banners, 2 additive torch flare sprites, broken pillars/rubble props.
preImplementationAudit.lightingBefore: AmbientLight 0x8a7a68 @0.9 + DirectionalLight 0xffb060 @0.7 from (6,10,3); no fill light; scene.background/fog 0x1c1510 (18..34).
preImplementationAudit.shadowSupport: renderer.shadowMap NOT enabled (antialias:false, pixelRatio 1). Units are camera-billboarded alpha-tested sprite planes -- true dynamic shadow maps would project the flat card, not the character silhouette. Per-unit contact blob (CircleGeometry, opacity 0.35) is the existing grounding treatment.
preImplementationAudit.unitScale: hero height 1.4 world units vs TILE=1 (approved 640x960 aspect preserved).
preImplementationAudit.hudStructure: full-viewport canvas background; floating overlays -- topbar (HP/wave/gold/level/speed/pause), left Link panel, right column (enemy wave + field team), bottom shop bar + toggles; CSS vars in autochess.html :root drive the theme (was navy-dark + gold).
preImplementationAudit.placeholders: non-caster heroes render shared placeholder spritesheets; monsters are static PNGs -- untouched by this task.
preImplementationAudit.safelyTunable: camera constants, FILL/BIAS composition ratios, light colors/intensities, tile/ground/rim/banner tints, fog, blob-shadow opacity, CSS theme vars -- all recomputed-through paths (layoutBoard + raycaster read the live camera), so no gameplay coordinate is affected.

whyItLookedWrong.tooWide: BOARD_FILL_RATIO 0.97 stretched the board to ~97% of viewport height, and at 45 deg the projected footprint spanned nearly the full landscape width.
whyItLookedWrong.tooFlat: 45 deg pitch + heavy foreshortening compressed depth; single warm light with strong warm ambient killed volume.
whyItLookedWrong.tooYellow: yellow ambient 0x8a7a68 + orange key 0xffb060 over yellow-brown tile stone (#6e6552/#5d5645).
whyItLookedWrong.tooDevLike: pale green/blue zone tints (0xb7c9b4/0xbfc4cf) read as a debug grid overlay.
whyItLookedWrong.disconnected: bright warm board vs navy-dark surround (rim/ground/banners/UI all navy) split the scene into two unrelated color worlds; board crammed at the bottom edge (DOWN_BIAS 0.97).

camera.note: More top-down tactical view with retained tilt; board compact (~65-75% of useful combat viewport between the floating panels) and confidently centered slightly below screen middle instead of stretched edge-to-edge at the bottom.

board.note: Warm dark stone, dev-grid green/blue zone cast removed; faint warm-vs-neutral zone distinction kept; select/drag highlight colors untouched.

environment.boardUnderglow: NEW: procedural radial warm glow plane under the board (depthWrite:false, below tile level, outside all raycast sets) blending board into floor
environment.note: One coherent warm dark-stone space instead of warm board vs navy surround.

lighting.note: Coherent warm key direction shared by units/board/environment, cool fill for volume/readability; all DirectionalLight -- render cost effectively unchanged, no shadow maps added.

grounding.trueDynamicShadowsDecision: unsuitable for billboarded alpha-tested sprite planes (a shadow map would cast the rectangular card, not the character silhouette) -- documented limitation; smallest original grounding treatment applied instead. No baked shadow was added to any approved motion frame.

themeVars.after: warm dark stone (--bg #0d0b08, --panel-bg #1a1510, --card-bg #221b12, borders #3d3322/#4a3d27); text warmed (#ece7dc/#a0968a); gold/green/red accents unchanged

ui.hardcodedNavySites: topbar gradient, pill background, HUD buttons, shop-bar/bag/evolution gradient (3 shared sites) moved to matching warm charcoal
ui.note: Dark panels with restrained gold accents matching the scene; no layout/flow/control change, no reference UI copied.

changes.evidenceHarness: projectToScreen(x,y,z) helper added to the existing window.__casterRuntimeTestHook (test-only; no gameplay path references it) to drive real pointer events for pointer-to-grid mapping verification under the new camera.

gameplayPreservation.boardTopologyUnchanged: GRID_COLS=8, GRID_ROWS=7, TILE=1, BENCH_ROW=6, MAX_BENCH=5, PLAYER_ROWS=[3,4,5] all untouched (repo board is 8 cols x 7 rows with the bottom row as the merged bench, per established repo history -- the task's '8x8' phrasing is honored as 'do not change topology').
gameplayPreservation.pointerToGridMappingVerified: real pointer events at projected coordinates: shop buy -> bench unit; bench tap-select -> tile tap placed at exactly (2,4); post-resize field-unit DRAG landed at exactly (5,4) -- both desktop and narrow viewports (field units reposition by drag only; tap toggles Link -- pre-existing intended behavior, unchanged).

validationRun.screenshotMatrix: before/after x desktop/narrow x {empty, 3 units, 5 units, 7 units (Mage/Summoner/Acolyte incl. duplicates, opposing facing), Basic Attack in progress} = 20 shots, all HUD areas visible
validationRun.casterMotionRegression: full deterministic suite re-run against the polish build (state transitions, character isolation, facing, repeated Basic Attack x1+x4, multi-unit, lifecycle/disposal, non-caster regression) -- ALL ASSERTIONS PASSED, 0 console errors

boardPreviewStatus: DEFERRED_UNTIL_AFTER_DEMO previously; this task adds an IN-RUNTIME visual-polish candidate that is PENDING Human Review -- it is NOT marked final or canonical, and the full game art direction is NOT claimed final.
knownLimitations: True dynamic shadow maps remain unimplemented -- unsuitable for the billboarded sprite architecture (would cast the card rectangle, not the silhouette); contact-blob grounding was strengthened instead.
Correction rounds used: 0 of the allowed 2 per area (first calibration pass landed within the target composition band at both tested viewports).
Non-caster heroes and monsters still use placeholder art -- out of scope; they inherit the new lighting only.
Torch flames, banners, pillars and rubble remain simple procedural props -- premium set-dressing beyond palette/lighting is future art-direction work.
Evidence captured in headless Chromium at 2 viewport sizes; physical-device confirmation remains for the user's own review.
The board is 8 cols x 7 rows with a merged bench row in this repository (not literally 8x8); topology untouched per the task's non-goal.
changedPaths: src/game.js (camera/lighting/palette/grounding constants + underglow + test-hook projection helper -- additive/parameter-only)
autochess.html (CSS theme vars + 6 hardcoded navy color sites -> warm charcoal)
tools/validate-class1-motion-runtime-caster-v1.mjs (changed-path allowlist extended for this branch's authorized polish paths only)
nextStep: User's visual decision on this Draft PR's evidence package. Not performed by this record: Melee Runtime, Monster Runtime, Skill/Cast, canonical art-direction approval, merge.
